payload.answer: This looks like a duplicate rather than a conflict: both memories say that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans. Safe actions available are: link_duplicate to treat the new item as the same fact as the existing memory, keep_existing to retain only the existing memory, add_anyway to store the new wording separately despite the duplication, edit to revise the new memory before saving, or cancel to take no action.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
New: Sam from Goldman said he likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The new memory appears to express the same durable fact as the existing memory, with only wording differences.

details: Identified semantic duplicate between existing and new memory.
